name: ats-job-postings-scraper
title: ATS Job Postings Scraper (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workable)
description: Scrape job postings from any company's career board on Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, or Workable. Input company slugs or careers URLs (auto-detected). Output: normalized JSON per job — title, department, location, remote flag, compensation, apply URL, description. Fetch-only, fast, no proxies.
